creator: cvs-src@yandex.ru
text:
Taglib library lists two python bindings on it's website[1]:
 - taglib-python (audio/py-taglib)
 - tagpy (audio/py-tagpy)

audio/py-taglib doesn't developed since 2005 and deprecated upstream [2]. It also work with python2.4 only, that is reached it's EOL. It's unmaintained and nobody in the tree depends on it. So i think we should mark it deprecated in remove in one month. User should be suggested to use audio/py-tagpy instead.

[1] http://developer.kde.org/~wheeler/taglib.html#bindings
[2] http://developer.berlios.de/project/showfiles.php?group_id=2066

tag: droppython24
